gist.headline: The hive is listening
gist.blurb: We've taught the hive a new trick! You can now use AssemblyAI's Universal models to turn your audio into perfectly transcribed text.
gist.summary: Added AssemblyAI's universal-2 and universal-3-pro models to the audio transcription API, complete with SDK and CLI support.
gist.impact: Developers can now route speech-to-text requests through AssemblyAI's powerful transcription models directly via the pollinations API.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about adding AssemblyAI (speech-to-text) to the platform. Visual symbols: audio waves, microphones, text documents, the pollinations bee. Scene concept: The bee wearing headphones, listening to a retro tape recorder or microphone, while the Nomnom creature eats audio waves and spits out text documents.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny retro headphones, listening to a chunky vintage tape recorder. Nearby, the round tan nomnom creature happily eats glowing audio waves and spits out neat stacks of text documents. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, chunky sprites, emotionally warm.
